title: Brett Delaney
extract:
Brett Delaney (born 26 October 1985) is an Australian rugby league coach and former professional rugby league footballer who was most recently assistant coach for Castleford Tigers in the Super League. He played as a centre and second-row forward in the 2000s and 2010s.
He played for Leeds in the Super League and for the Parramatta Eels and Gold Coast Titans in the NRL.
